shared_core.rule: Treewalk apply_prim and CALLPRIM vm_callprim must delegate mutation to the same implementation. Each route retains its own strict-arity check and its established error channel.

semantic_gates.registry_cross_parity: 61 active primitive IDs, 207 cases, four engines, 828 evaluations
semantic_gates.type_errors: rplaca and rplacd reject non-cons operands before entering the shared mutation core

capacity_rule: A real candidate link must be compared with an isolated link of baseline commit 5720f16. Every frozen capacity dimension is reported even when unchanged.
claim_limit: The probe proves shared C mutation semantics, existing route contracts, and real-link capacity only. It does not promote a product candidate or reuse hardware evidence.
